data.title: Remove --resume reference from end-session SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md line 387 to remove --resume from the resume command reference.

Change: "/dso:sprint <epic-id> --resume" or "Run \`/dso:debug-everything\` again"
To: "/dso:sprint <epic-id>" or "Run \`/dso:debug-everything\` again"

Auto-detect now handles resume automatically when the epic is in_progress.

This is safeguard file plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md — task-level authorization granted by this task description.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] --resume no longer appears in end-session SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -q '\-\-resume' plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md
